sp_widget.description: Tasker Portal Board with Filter 2.7 - rewrite HTML to not use pull right because Bootstrap's Dropdown control has deprecated that use
sp_widget.name: Tasker Portal Board with Filter
sp_widget.option_schema: [{"hint":"If enabled, show the list filter in the breadcrumbs of the data table","name":"enable_filter","default_value":"false","section":"Behavior","label":"Enable Filter","type":"boolean"}]
sp_widget.template:
• ${Open in platform}
  • ${Export as} {{::t.label}}
{{data.title || data.table_plural}}
  • {{menuItem.header}}
    • {{filter.filter_label}}
      {{filter.count}}

{{data.title || data.table_plural}} ${table} - ${page} {{data.p}}

${No records in {{data.table_label}} using that filter}
${Loading data}...
{{data.column_labels[field]}}
 ${Comments}
{{::item[field].display_value}} {{::item[field].display_value}} {{::item[field].display_value}} {{data.popOverRecord[item.sys_id].numComments}}
${{{rowsPruned}} row removed by security constraints} ${{{rowsPruned}} rows removed by security constraints}
{{$index + 1}}
${Rows {{data.window_start + 1}} - {{mathMin(data.window_end,data.row_count) }} of {{data.row_count}}}
